They are suitable for all your hot and cold drinks and, thanks to their neutral appearance, can be combined with every menu or packaging concept These all-purpose cups are widely used by food-service and catering companies, in offices & canteens, during events, festivals & trade shows for hot drinks Triple Layer Kraft Disposable Coffee Cups Lightweight - Water Resistance The lightweight cups are made of sturdy, leak-proof cardboard and, thanks to the rolled rim, are pleasant to drink out of. The water-resistant cups are also hygienic and easy to use, stack and take off the stack one at a time. Kraft Paper Cups Cup sleeves are available to make the cups extra comfortable to hold when the contents are very hot. This rippled wall also allows for a better grip, reducing the chance of slipping or spilling the piping hot beverage within the cup. Rippled Wall The outside of each cup features a unique ripped wall design that eliminates the need for a compatible cup sleeve to prevent burns. PLA Coating - Insulation For superior durability, this cup boasts a PLA coating inside the cup to resist condensation accumulation also to keep beverages warmer, longer. User Friendly This cup is the User-friendly way to serve hot beverages, to-go, to all of your eco-conscious consumers! Rolled Rim The cup has a tightly rolled rim that provides mess-free sipping and creates a tight and secure seal when used with a compatible lid.
